title: Can you format the text of Item Update in Monday's JotForm Integration?
excerpt: I have 2 forms I am using on JotFrom and I want to set a dropdown based on which form is submitted. In Monday, I tried this using the JotForm integration and it works, but the Item Update option didn’t seem like you’re a…

posts.author: ninati (Nina)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have 2 forms I am using on JotFrom and I want to set a dropdown based on which form is submitted. In Monday, I tried this using the JotForm integration and it works, but the Item Update option didn’t seem like you’re able to format the text at all? Is it possible to format the text?

thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nina,

I am afraid formatting the text isn’t currently possible natively in the Integration. I apologise for the setback here
